title: One Chunk Blocks
description: Turns generated chunks into single-block chunk mosaics while keeping Minecraft fully beatable.
body:
One Chunk Blocks turns world generation into a chunk-by-chunk block mosaic.

  After terrain and features are generated, each chunk is assigned one deterministic block from a large palette. Most
  solid blocks inside that chunk are then replaced with that chosen block, so one chunk may become stone, another may
  become quartz, another may become obsidian, copper, terracotta, wood, planks, or many other full blocks.

  ## Gameplay

  This mod creates a chaotic and unusual survival world where every new chunk can look completely different from the
  previous one. It is meant for challenge runs, strange exploration, and worlds that feel unpredictable without fully
  breaking progression.

  ## Notes

  This mod affects newly generated chunks. Existing terrain that was already generated before installing the mod will
  not be changed.
